bdSection.subtitle: Deep native integration with Bangladesh's top 3 courier services. Auto-synced, auto-updated — no manual dashboard checking ever again.
bdSection.flowDesc: Stop checking courier dashboards manually 10 times a day. WooBooster polls all three in the background and updates WooCommerce automatically.
bdSection.check1: Background polling every hour — zero server load
bdSection.check4: One-click manual sync from order list
bdSection.check5: Per-courier API key management from WP admin
bdSection.payDesc: Pay in BDT. Invoices in Taka. Dedicated BD support line.

howItWorks.title: Up and Running in 10 Minutes
howItWorks.subtitle: No developer needed. Install, activate, and WooBooster handles everything automatically.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Upload the plugin, activate, enter your license key from the purchase email. Done in under 2 minutes.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Paste your Steadfast / Pathao / RedX API keys and Meta Pixel ID + CAPI token. Simple copy-paste.
howItWorks.step3Desc: WooBooster polls couriers, updates statuses, fires tracking events, and blocks fraud — 24/7, automatically.

featuresPage.title: Everything WooBooster Does
featuresPage.subtitle: Six powerful modules, one unified plugin. No integrations to wrestle with. No APIs to manage separately.

0.title: Automated Courier Sync
0.description: Automatically polls Steadfast, Pathao, and RedX in the background and updates your WooCommerce order statuses in real-time. Zero manual tracking.
0.detailDescription: WooBooster polls Steadfast, Pathao, and RedX every hour in the background, automatically updating your WooCommerce order statuses — delivered, returned, or cancelled.
checks: Background polling — no manual action needed
Per-courier API key from WordPress admin
One-click manual sync from order list

1.title: Advanced Analytics
1.description: Revenue trends, courier performance charts, and live-polling stats — all in one beautiful dashboard.

2.title: Fraud Shield
2.description: Block bad actors by phone, IP, or email. Velocity limits stop automated abuse before orders are placed.
2.detailDescription: Bangladesh eCommerce has a high fake-order rate. Block bad actors before they cost you money — by phone number, IP address, or email. Velocity limits stop repeat abuse.
checks: Velocity limits — max orders per user
One-click block from the order table

3.title: Meta Pixel + CAPI
3.description: Hybrid browser + server-side tracking that survives iOS 14 and ad-blockers. 100% accurate conversions.
3.detailDescription: Browser-side pixels miss 30–40% of conversions. WooBooster’s hybrid approach combines browser Pixel with server-side CAPI — every purchase tracked, every time.
checks: Unified Tracking Hub for all platforms

4.title: Lead Recovery
4.description: Capture checkout fields in real-time as users type. Convert incomplete orders into paying customers.

5.title: Premium UI System
5.description: Light & dark admin themes with glassmorphism, emerald accents, and micro-animations.

pricingPage.title: Simple, One-Time Pricing
pricingPage.subtitle: No subscriptions. No monthly fees. Pay once, own it forever. Updates included. Priced in BDT for Bangladeshi sellers.

0.question: Is this a one-time payment or subscription?
0.answer: One-time payment. No monthly or annual fees. You own it forever. Updates included for 1 year (Starter) or lifetime (Pro & Agency).

1.question: Which couriers are supported?
1.answer: Steadfast, Pathao, and RedX — Bangladesh's top three courier services. More are on the roadmap based on user demand.

2.question: Do I need a developer?
2.answer: No. If you can install a WordPress plugin, you can fully set up WooBooster. The wizard guides you step-by-step.

3.question: Can I pay in BDT using bKash or Nagad?
3.answer: Yes. We accept bKash, Nagad, Rocket, and bank transfer. Email mhs@wpmhs.com to arrange local payment.

4.question: What is your refund policy?
4.answer: 30-day money-back guarantee, no questions asked. Email mhs@wpmhs.com within 30 days for a full refund within 24 hours.

changelogPage.title: What's New in WooBooster

0.name: Analytics Suite Release
changes: Full analytics dashboard with revenue trends and courier performance charts
Unified Tracking Hub — manage all pixels from one interface
Live background polling with auto-refresh stats

1.name: Fraud Shield & CAPI Events
changes: Global blacklist by phone, IP, and email address
Velocity limits — max orders per user per day
One-click block buttons in the WooCommerce order table

2.name: RedX Integration & Lead Capture
changes: RedX courier deep integration with auto status sync
Incomplete order capture — saves checkout fields in real-time
Lead management interface to view and convert leads
Pathao API timeout handling on slow network conditions
